steps.title: Make the noun possessive
steps.content: The sentence refers to two towns, Arteaga and Lagos de Moreno. The blank must show that the natural beauty and cultural traditions belong to both towns.

steps.title: Choose the plural possessive
steps.content: Choice A is singular and not possessive. Choice B is singular possessive, but two towns are named. Choice C is plural but not possessive. The plural possessive form shows ownership by both towns. The answer is D.
